jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Milton
jsonLd.description:
We at Milton are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Milton:
Milton is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milton!
